recommendations.title: Sunshine
recommendations.overview: Fifty years into the future, the sun is dying, and Earth is threatened by arctic temperatures. A team of astronauts is sent to revive the Sun — but the mission fails. Seven years later, a new team is sent to finish the mission as mankind’s last hope.

recommendations.title: Space Battleship Yamato

recommendations.title: Mutant Chronicles

recommendations.title: Guardians of the Galaxy
recommendations.overview: Light years from Earth, 26 years after being abducted, Peter Quill finds himself the prime target of a manhunt after discovering an orb wanted by Ronan the Accuser.

recommendations.title: Eternals
recommendations.overview: The Eternals are a team of ancient aliens who have been living on Earth in secret for thousands of years. When an unexpected tragedy forces them out of the shadows, they are forced to reunite against mankind’s most ancient enemy, the Deviants.

recommendations.title: Doppelgänger

recommendations.title: Project Hail Mary

recommendations.title: Collision Earth
recommendations.genres: Action, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Drama
recommendations.overview: A huge solar flare blasts Mercury out of it's orbit and provides it with an intense magnetic field and it's on collision course for Earth.

recommendations.title: Arif V 216
recommendations.overview: After 8 years, Arif's old friend 216 from planet GORA pays a visit to Earth.Together they go on a quest where they'll be visiting 60's.
